titel: Video message from President von der Leyen at Decarbon Days in Cottbus.
html:
Speech by the European Commission, Brussels, June 24, 2026.

Ladies and gentlemen, Dear Christian Ehler, thank you for allowing me to join you for a while. It's amazing what you have managed to achieve here during Decarbon Day...
tldr: On June 24, 2026, Ursula von der Leyen, President of the European Commission, delivered a speech at an event called "Decarbon Days" in Cottbus. The speech focused on efforts to reduce carbon dioxide emissions.
lattlast:
The President of the European Commission, who leads the EU's government, delivered a video message during a meeting in the city of Cottbus. The meeting, called "Decarbon Days," focused on how to reduce carbon dioxide emissions in Europe.

In her speech, she thanked Christian Ehler for the opportunity to participate in the event. She expressed her appreciation for the work that had been done during those days to achieve climate goals.

The text is an excerpt from a speech given in Brussels on June 24, 2026. It highlights the EU's focus on transforming industry to make it more environmentally friendly.
